approval_questions.question: Approve selection_id d004_alkmaar_berkhout_2014_2023_v1 as the D-004 source-selection bundle for PI-reviewed raw retrieval?
Approve the Alkmaar GM0361 representative point at latitude 52.63167, longitude 4.74861 for PVGIS requests?
approval_questions.recommendation: approve as an exogenous local-area proxy aligned with the proposed EV-007 Alkmaar cluster

approval_questions.question: Approve KNMI station 249 Berkhout as the primary weather station for temperature and global radiation?
approval_questions.recommendation: approve, with Wijk aan Zee station 257 or Schiphol station 240 retained only as fallback/sensitivity candidates

approval_questions.question: Approve using KNMI validated hourly station ZIPs as the first D-004 source-selection route instead of the previously planned near-real-time 10-minute in-situ bulk archive?
approval_questions.recommendation: approve for first real-source retrieval because KNMI documents weekday quality control, correction, and missing-value supplementation for hourly files

approval_questions.question: Approve the 2014-2023 historical weather-member window, filtered from the two KNMI Berkhout decade ZIP files and matched to PVGIS 5.3 SARAH-3 coverage through 2023?
approval_questions.recommendation: approve as a ten-year annual-member library that avoids incomplete future/current-year data

approval_questions.question: Approve the normalized fixed PVGIS/PV reference configuration: 1.0 kWp, 14 percent losses, fixed plane, 35 degree tilt, 0 degree south-facing aspect, PVGIS-SARAH3, JSON output?
approval_questions.recommendation: approve for calibration/validation reference only; physical PV fleet sizing remains outside this packet

long_run_notice_text_if_scope_expands:
LONG-RUN NOTICE
Task: E2.S4 / D-004 PI-approved weather/PV source retrieval and checksum recording
Process: Download two KNMI Berkhout validated hourly ZIP files plus two PVGIS JSON reference files for d004_alkmaar_berkhout_2014_2023_v1; compute SHA-256 metadata and do not use outputs until PI acceptance.
Estimated wall time: expected under 15 minutes based on KNMI HEAD sizes of 1,536,802 bytes and 838,086 bytes plus small PVGIS JSON responses; if PVGIS/KNMI response time or a revised 10-minute in-situ route pushes the estimate over 15 minutes, stop and use the checkpoint/resume plan from data/metadata/weather_pv/d004_weather_pv_execution_plan.json before launch.
Resource impact: small network transfer, light CPU for SHA-256 hashing, ignored raw files under data/raw/weather_pv, committed checksum metadata only after review.
Checkpoint plan: for this small four-file route, restart failed files from byte zero and accept only complete files with final SHA-256 metadata; if the PI requires 10-minute in-situ bulk retrieval, extend the downloader to .tmp streaming with per-file and 64 MiB checkpoints before launch.
Resume procedure: rerun the approved retrieval commands; skip only files with matching final checksum metadata; otherwise restart the incomplete target from byte zero.

proposed_selection.shared_weather_status: WEATHER-001 resolved Q-8 at the contract level; this packet still does not create accepted D-004 weather members
proposed_selection.weather_member_policy: Each accepted year 2014-2023 becomes one complete chronological weather member on the common UTC/local calendar; HP and PV must later consume the same member_id/shared_weather_driver_id under ALEA-001.

site.coordinate_source: GeoNames populated-place coordinate used as exogenous representative point; municipality identity follows EV-007 Alkmaar cluster proposal

pvgis.use_boundary: seriescalc and tmy are calibration/validation references only; PVGIS TMY is not a realized weather path

station.selection_basis: Berkhout is a North-Holland AWS with station 249 decade-hourly data available and documented continuity of temperature, precipitation, global radiation, and visibility measurements near Hoorn/Berkhout.

year_range.filter_rule: download the two decade ZIP files, then extract/filter only complete calendar years 2014-2023 for accepted members

knmi.fallback_if_not_approved: Retain the previous Open Data API 10-minute in-situ route for station 249, but require an enumerated API file list and resumable bulk downloader before raw retrieval.
